message:
chore: rustfmt cleanups in arxiv connector and trace_context fuzz target

Whitespace-only changes adopting the project rustfmt style:

connectors/arxiv/src/connector.rs:
  Collapse `simulate_denied`'s parameter list onto a single line
  (rustfmt-decided width).

connectors/arxiv/tests/integration.rs:
  - Re-indent `.as_bool().unwrap()` to align with rustfmt's expected
    method-chain continuation in `simulate_known`.
  - Reflow the `("arxiv.extract_references", ...)` tuple in
    `simulate_all_operations` to put the JSON literal on its own line
    so the row no longer exceeds the configured max width.

fuzz/fuzz_targets/trace_context.rs:
  Move the `assert!(...)` macro arguments off the
  `assert!(ctx.<chain>...)` form (which rustfmt no longer accepts as
  the canonical layout) into the parenthesized-block form that
  rustfmt now produces.

No logic, behavior, or public API changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -871,8 +871,8 @@ async fn simulate_known() {
         }))
         .await
         .unwrap()["allowed"]
-        .as_bool()
-        .unwrap()
+            .as_bool()
+            .unwrap()
     );
 }
 
@@ -901,7 +901,10 @@ async fn simulate_all_operations() {
         ("arxiv.download_pdf", json!({"arxiv_id": "1706.03762"})),
         ("arxiv.get_citations", json!({"arxiv_id": "1706.03762"})),
         ("arxiv.get_references", json!({"arxiv_id": "1706.03762"})),
-        ("arxiv.extract_references", json!({"arxiv_id": "1706.03762"})),
+        (
+            "arxiv.extract_references",
+            json!({"arxiv_id": "1706.03762"}),
+        ),
         ("arxiv.get_author", json!({"author_name": "Alice"})),
         ("arxiv.list_categories", json!({})),
         ("arxiv.get_new_papers", json!({"category": "cs.AI"})),
